profile.title: Profile

reportQuickFlow.title: SACH MAP Quick Report - 4 Steps
reportQuickFlow.description: A clean and user-friendly reporting flow for all citizens.
reportQuickFlow.aiGeneratedNotice: The content is AI-generated from your image and can be edited before submission.
reportQuickFlow.step1Hint: Capture a photo now or upload an existing violation image.
reportQuickFlow.step2Hint: Location is detected automatically, then fine-tuned using the mini map picker.
reportQuickFlow.step3Hint: AI suggests title and description based on the uploaded image.
reportQuickFlow.step4Hint: Select a violation type, confirm submission, and receive a unique tracking ID.

mapExperience.title: SACH MAP - Interactive Environmental Map
mapExperience.description: Track reports, pollution hotspots, and processing progress in real time.
